holdings.infoBox: RINT is an equity ETF with a total of 363 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 2.56%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 1.51%, UBS Group AG at 1.34%, HSBC Holdings at 1.13%, and Shell at 1.01%.

overview.description: The International Developed Equity ETF (RINT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital growth through investments in non-US equity securities from developed markets. Security selection is based on a multi-style and multi-manager approach. RINT was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Russell Investments.
